name: fha-fha-extension
description: Your code has errors. You will be judged. Audibly.

fhaFha.enabled.description: Enable or disable Faah Faah. You can also toggle from the status bar (bottom).

fhaFha.sirenSoundPath.description: Custom .mp3 file path for siren sound (.env errors). Leave empty for default siren.

fhaFha.victorySoundPath.description: Custom .mp3 file path for victory sound (when all errors are fixed). Leave empty for default.

fhaFha.errorSoundPath.description: Custom .mp3 file path for error sound. Leave empty to use default faaah sound.

fhaFha.warningSoundPath.description: Custom path to warning sound (.mp3). Leave empty to disable warning sounds

fhaFha.debounceMs.description: Delay (ms) before sound triggers after an error. Increase to avoid mid-typing sounds. Default: 2000ms

fhaFha.triggerOnSave.description: Only trigger sounds on file save (Ctrl+S), not while typing. Recommended if sounds play mid-sentence.

fhaFha.triggerMode.description: onType: trigger on every diagnostic change | onSave: trigger only on file save

fhaFha.terminalSounds.description: Play sounds when terminal commands fail or build commands succeed.

fhaFha.zenMode.description: Zen Mode: notifications show but sounds are muted. Use Mute to silence everything.

fhaFha.liveScores.enabled.description: Enable live sports score updates in the status bar and popup notifications.

fhaFha.liveScores.sports.description: Sports to show live scores for. Add/remove as needed.

fhaFha.liveScores.pollIntervalMinutes.description: How often to fetch live scores (in minutes). Default: 5

fhaFha.liveScores.showScoreChangePopup.description: Show a popup notification when a score changes (goal, wicket, basket, etc.)

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
